para_trans: GOVERNMENT ORDER NUMBER: TRANSFER 2026 / Q.No.69 / PRASHT-2
The aforesaid transferred officers shall be replaced by the respective Controlling Officers in their present capacity.
The immediate discharge from office and immediate joining of the place of new appointment should be communicated.
and report of assumption of office to the Government through the Commissioner, Skill Development, Employment and Entrepreneurship.
be submitted.
3. Transfer officers not to go on leave unauthorisedly or to make changes in posting.
No submissions / applications should be made. In doing so, they are in violation of Rule 23 of the Maharashtra Civil Services (Conduct) Rules, 1979.
They should note that they will be liable for disciplinary action if they are deemed to have done so.
4. Maharashtra Civil Service (Adoption) for transfer of transferred officers to join the place of transfer.
Term, Non-Service and Provisions during Suspension, Dismissal and Removal from Service) Rules, 1981
The period of assumption of office and transferable travel allowance as provided in the Act is admissible as per the prevailing rules of the Government.
will remain.

In the event of receipt of an application that the transferred officer's leave applications of any kind should not be entertained, it shall be
